name: Status Reporting
description: Creates clear, structured progress reports that communicate project or campaign status to stakeholders, highlighting achievements, risks, and next steps.

variables.name: reporting_period
variables.description: Time period covered: week of, month of, Q1 2026

variables.name: project_campaign
variables.description: Name of the project or campaign being reported on

variables.name: metrics
variables.description: Key performance metrics and their current values

variables.name: status
variables.description: Overall status: on track, at risk, or off track

inputs.name: reporting_period
inputs.description: Time period covered: week of, month of, Q1 2026

inputs.name: project_campaign
inputs.description: Name of the project or campaign being reported on

inputs.name: metrics
inputs.description: Key performance metrics and their current values

inputs.name: status
inputs.description: Overall status: on track, at risk, or off track
